creator: clive@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

enlightenment-conf was ever in FreeBSD's ports collection, 
but it was also removed from FreeBSD's ports collection when 
e16 came to this world. Could you try ports/x11-wm/e16utils ? 

SFAIK, there're some incompatibilities when enlightenment-conf 
is used in a e16 environment.
